title: augustine's Potato Trailers
description: Wanna get the trailer look and not set your PC on fire? [ONLY CORESHADERS USED-near zero fps impact]
body:
# Potato Trailers
Make your game look like the Minecraft trailers without hurting performance. For those low end PCs that can't even run shaders. MAJOR CREDITS TO DR7 for their ReShaded resourcepack. You can check it out here: [ReShaded](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/re-shaded)
## Why does this exist?
Most of the trailer lookalike modpacks are beautiful, but rely on shaders to get that look. Let's be real, we cannot run those with decent frames. That's where **Potato Trailers** comes in. This modpack on its default settings averages 90-120fps on INTEGRATED GRAPHICS (_intel hd 620 running cachyos_) It does that while looking pretty admirable in my honest opinion (take a look)



![Taiga Village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90c10e404e0adbf152bcc3ac78b5ba925ce38d9b.png)
![Sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb0caaae5931477c36435ef616e5c40c601c767d.png)
![Cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08bb10e17064e8d95618ec4cfb1a47b51b08adef.png)



## How does it work?
**Potato Trailers** makes use of Reshaded resource pack by DR7 (essentially, core shaders without shaders). ~~Additionally, Simply Optimized by hsza is built right in for those sweet sweet fps gains~~
Unfortunately, that project has now been abandoned, so we will be moving over to Fabulously Optimized soon!



-------

All mod and resourcepack contents belong to their original authors. I'm only responsible for compilation of the pack and their reconfiguration. If you like the pack, send some love over to them as well :)
